name: Conch Fritters
recipeIngredient: Cajun seasoning (1 teaspoon for mild, 2 teaspoons for spicy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Have the fish market tenderize the conch.
2. Marinate the conch in 1 cup lime juice and 1/4 cup olive oil for at least 30 minutes. Drain.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Shape the mixture into small patties.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or heavy-based saucepan to 350°F (175°C).
6. Fry the patties by tablespoons, turning occasionally, until golden brown and crispy, about 3-5 minutes per side.
7. Serve with red cocktail sauce or tartar sauce.
